'''chamubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yacht|yacht]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yacht|yacht]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chamubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæmibith|chæmibith]] || [[word:chæmibij|chæmibij]] || [[word:chæmibish|chæmibish]] || [[word:chæmibi|chæmibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chamumubuth|chamumubuth]] || [[word:chamumubuj|chamumubuj]] || [[word:chamumubush|chamumubush]] || [[word:chamumubu|chamumubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chamubuth|chamubuth]] || [[word:chamubuj|chamubuj]] || [[word:chamubush|chamubush]] || [[word:chamubu|chamubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chamufbuth|chamufbuth]] || [[word:chamufbuj|chamufbuj]] || [[word:chamufbush|chamufbush]] || [[word:chamufbuf|chamufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chamubuthu|chamubuthu]] || [[word:chamubuju|chamubuju]] || [[word:chamubushu|chamubushu]] || [[word:chamubuku|chamubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chamubuth|chamubuth]] || [[word:chamubuj|chamubuj]] || [[word:chamubush|chamubush]] || [[word:chamubu|chamubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chamubuthul|chamubuthul]] || [[word:chamubujul|chamubujul]] || [[word:chamubushul|chamubushul]] || [[word:chamubukul|chamubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chamubuthuthu|chamubuthuthu]] || [[word:chamubujuju|chamubujuju]] || [[word:chamubushushu|chamubushushu]] || [[word:chamubuku|chamubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chamubuthun|chamubuthun]] || [[word:chamubujun|chamubujun]] || [[word:chamubushun|chamubushun]] || [[word:chamubukun|chamubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chamubuthuoro|chamubuthuoro]] || [[word:chamubujuoro|chamubujuoro]] || [[word:chamubushuoro|chamubushuoro]] || [[word:chamubukuoro|chamubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
